cv_metrics_race.note: Cross validation metrics(race level) The model is trained on older activities and validated on the recent activities(TimeSeriesSplit)MAE/RMSE measured in seconds, MAPE in percentage, R2 is between 0 and 1

train_metrics_race.note: Metrics on the final training set(race-level): segment prediction are added upto obtain the race prediction. Low error on training set/ High error on test setcan be a sign of overfitting!

test_metrics_race.note: Metrics on the final training set (race-level, unseen running activities): segment predictions are added up for each activity and compared with the actual race time of the activity This is the main evaluation metric

shap_importance.note: The importance of each feature calculated with SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) Each value represents the average of the absolute SHAP values ​​over the entire dataset(in seconds)Interpretation: a feature that has a shap value of 60 means that on average, that feature change the segment time prediction by ±60 secunde. The features are sorted descending based on the impact.

feature_descriptions.segment_energy_cost: Minetti energy cost (J/kg): 155.4*g^5 - 30.4*g^4 - 43.3*g^3 + 46.3*g^2 + 19.5*g + 3.6, multiplied by distance — validated biomechanical formula for running on slopes
feature_descriptions.downhill_cost: Downhill cost: distance * (1 + 6 * |gradient|) — 0 for non-downhill segments
feature_descriptions.is_race: 1 if parent activity is a race, 0 otherwise — captures intentional maximum effort
feature_descriptions.avg_elevation: Mean elevation of segment (m above sea level)
feature_descriptions.is_easy: 1 if parent activity is a recovery run, 0 otherwise — captures intentional low effort
feature_descriptions.avg_gradient: Mean absolute gradient of segment (0.1 = 10%) — unsigned
feature_descriptions.std_gradient: Standard deviation of gradient in segment — measures terrain irregularity
feature_descriptions.max_downhill_gradient: Max downhill gradient in segment (0 for non-downhill segments)
feature_descriptions.uphill_cost: Uphill cost: distance * (1 + 6 * gradient) — 0 for non-uphill segments
feature_descriptions.cumulative_elevation: Cumulative elevation gain from activity start to end of this segment (m) — proxy for accumulated fatigue
feature_descriptions.max_uphill_gradient: Max uphill gradient in segment (0 for non-uphill segments)
feature_descriptions.cumulative_distance: Cumulative distance from activity start to end of this segment (m) — proxy for accumulated fatigue
